description: Composition Purple sleeveless V-neck T-shirt made of 95% viscose cotton and 5% lycra, has a sequin embellishments at the neck Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach Use warm iron, do not iron on print arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This T-shirt is a glamourised version of the typical tee with its slim silhouette and sequins. Pair it with richly hued denims, a jacket, sky high heels and a scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
